source: UCSC phyloP100way (hg38) + Ensembl GERP constrained elements

gtex_eqtl.interpretation: Zero eQTLs across entire beta-globin cluster — extreme purifying selection depletes common regulatory variants

conclusions: Pearl positions are 3.3x more conserved than flanking background (PhyloP 2.39 vs 0.73)
53% of pearl positions have PhyloP > 2 (conserved); 18% have PhyloP > 4 (highly conserved)
All pearl positions fall within GERP constrained elements (scores 8.4-81.3, threshold > 4)
Zero GTEx eQTLs for HBB in Whole Blood — consistent with strong purifying selection
Evolutionary conservation independently supports ARCHCODE's identification of these positions as functionally important
